Ii 1/9/96-711. 1m] 111mm,11f‘aq 3054GI/ 96 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- N THE. GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART IIWSEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th December, 1996 S. O. 862 (E).——Whereas a vacancy has occrured 1n the Cauvcry Water Disputes Tribunal, constituted by the notifica- tion of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources No. S. O. 437 (E) dated the 2nd June, 1990, consequent on the resignation of Shri Justice ChittatOSh Mookeljee; 1 And whereas, the Chief Justice of India has nominated Shri Justice N. P. Singh, Judge, Supreme Court to fill the said vacancy under section 5A of the Inter-State Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956); Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 4, read with section 5A of the said Act, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the said notification, namely 1—— In the said notification for item (i), the following item shall be substituted, namely :—— “0) Shri Justice N. P. Singh, Judge of the Supreme Court ... Chairman" By order and in the name of the President of India. [F. No 1/9/96~BM] MATA PRASAD, Secy. Printed by the Manager. Govt of India Press, Ring Road.
